messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Service Gateway

### Service Gateway

```hcl
resource "oci_core_service_gateway" "service_gw" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  vcn_id        = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id
  display_name = "service-gateway"

  services {
    service_id = data.oci_core_services.oci_services.objectstorage.id
  }
}
```

### Route Table

```hcl
resource "oci_core_route_table" "private_rt" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  vcn_id         = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id

  route_rules {
    destination       = "oci.oraclecloud.com"
    destination_type = "SERVICE_CIDR_BLOCK"
    network_entity_id = oci_core_service_gateway.service_gw.id
  }
}
```

### Services

- Object Storage
- Vault
- ADW
- OKE

### Benefits

- Trafego privado para OCI services
- Sem internet exposure
- Custo menor
